requirement_analysis_templates.description_zh: 用于分析保温杯产品设计需求的模板

example.material_requirements: stainless steel 316 inner, stainless steel 304 outer
example.craftsmanship_requirements: injection molding PP lid, ultrasonic welding assembly
example.timeline: 3 months for design, 6 months for production

requirement_analysis_templates.name: 市场调研需求分析模板
requirement_analysis_templates.name_zh: 市场调研需求分析模板
requirement_analysis_templates.description: 用于分析保温杯市场调研需求的模板
requirement_analysis_templates.description_zh: 用于分析保温杯市场调研需求的模板

example.research_scope: high-end vacuum cup market in China
example.deliverables: market research report with consumer insights and recommendations

task_sorting_rules.name: 按优先级排序
task_sorting_rules.description: 根据任务优先级（P0/P1/P2/P3）进行排序
task_sorting_rules.description_zh: 根据任务优先级（P0/P1/P2/P3）进行排序
task_sorting_rules.example: Task A (P0) → Task B (P1) → Task C (P2) → Task D (P3)

task_sorting_rules.name: 按依赖关系排序
task_sorting_rules.description: 根据任务依赖关系进行排序，被依赖的任务先执行
task_sorting_rules.description_zh: 根据任务依赖关系进行排序，被依赖的任务先执行
task_sorting_rules.rule: if Task B depends on Task A, then Task A → Task B
task_sorting_rules.rule_zh: 如果任务B依赖于任务A，则任务A → 任务B
task_sorting_rules.example: Task A (design) → Task B (prototype) → Task C (testing)

task_sorting_rules.name: 按专业领域排序
task_sorting_rules.description: 根据任务所需专业领域匹配最合适的专家
task_sorting_rules.description_zh: 根据任务所需专业领域匹配最合适的专家
task_sorting_rules.rule: match task expertise requirement with expert's core responsibility
task_sorting_rules.rule_zh: 匹配任务专业领域要求与专家核心职责
task_sorting_rules.example: product design task → Snake expert; image generation task → Sheep expert; competitive analysis task → Dragon expert

team_coordination_workflows.name: 设计到生产协调流程
team_coordination_workflows.description: 协调产品设计团队与生产团队的工作流程
team_coordination_workflows.description_zh: 协调产品设计团队与生产团队的工作流程
steps: Step 1: Snake expert (product design) completes product design
Step 2: Rat expert (requirements analysis) reviews design against original requirements
Step 3: Rat expert communicates design to Ox expert (workflow standards) for manufacturability review
Step 4: Rat expert coordinates with Horse expert (workflow optimization) for production process design
Step 5: Rat expert coordinates with Monkey expert (parameter tuning) for production parameter optimization
Step 6: Rat expert coordinates with Rooster expert (image review) for product photography planning
Step 7: Rat expert confirms all teams are aligned before production starts
steps_zh: 步骤1：蛇专家（产品设计）完成产品设计
步骤2：鼠专家（需求分析）审核设计与原始需求的一致性
步骤3：鼠专家将设计传达给牛专家（工作流标准）进行可制造性审核
步骤4：鼠专家协调马专家（工作流优化）进行生产工艺设计
步骤5：鼠专家协调猴专家（参数调优）进行生产参数优化
步骤6：鼠专家协调鸡专家（图像评审）进行产品摄影规划
步骤7：鼠专家确认所有团队在生产开始前达成一致

team_coordination_workflows.name: 市场调研到设计协调流程
team_coordination_workflows.name_zh: 市场调研到设计协调流程
team_coordination_workflows.description: 协调市场调研团队与产品设计团队的工作流程
team_coordination_workflows.description_zh: 协调市场调研团队与产品设计团队的工作流程
steps: Step 1: Dog expert (intelligence gathering) collects market intelligence
Step 2: Dragon expert (competitive analysis) analyzes competitors
Step 3: Rat expert (requirements analysis) synthesizes market research into design requirements
Step 4: Rat expert communicates design requirements to Snake expert (product design)
Step 5: Snake expert creates initial design
Step 6: Rat expert reviews initial design against requirements
Step 7: Rat expert coordinates feedback loop between market research team and design team
steps_zh: 步骤1：狗专家（情报收集）收集市场情报
步骤2：龙专家（竞品分析）分析竞争对手
步骤3：鼠专家（需求分析）综合市场调研结果形成设计需求
步骤4：鼠专家将设计需求传达给蛇专家（产品设计）
步骤5：蛇专家创建初步设计
步骤6：鼠专家审核初步设计是否符合需求
步骤7：鼠专家协调市场调研团队与设计团队之间的反馈循环

metadata.application: 十二生肖团需求分析与团队协调
metadata.application_zh: 十二生肖团需求分析与团队协调
